mostFrequentlyAskedArticles: Article 164 (Appointment and responsibility of Chief Minister and Ministers)
Article 169 (Creation or abolition of Legislative Councils)
Article 170 & 171 (Composition of Legislative Assembly and Council)
Article 243D & 243T (Reservation of seats for Women and SC/ST in Panchayats and Municipalities)
frequentlyAskedCommittees: Balwant Rai Mehta Committee (1957) - 3-tier Panchayati Raj recommendation
Ashok Mehta Committee (1978) - 2-tier Panchayati Raj recommendation
L.M. Singhvi Committee (1986) - Constitutional status recommendation for local bodies
G.V.K. Rao Committee (1985) - Review of rural development and 'grass without roots' observation
Sarkaria Commission (1983) - Centre-State relations and Governor's role
frequentlyAskedConstitutional Offices: Governor (appointment, pleasure of President, ordinances, and discretionary powers)
Advocate General of the State (Article 165 qualification and role)
State Election Commissioner (independence and removal process similar to HC Judge)
State Finance Commissioner (constitution every 5 years by Governor)
Speaker of Legislative Assembly (certifying Money Bills and casting vote)
repeatedThemes: Comparative analysis between Union Executive (President/PM) and State Executive (Governor/CM) articles and powers.
Exact numerical figures (e.g., minimum age of 21 for local bodies vs 25 for assembly, 1/3rd women reservation, 29 items in Schedule 11, 18 items in Schedule 12).
Constitutional Amendment milestones specifically focusing on the 73rd and 74th Amendment Acts of 1992 and the 7th Amendment of 1956.
Distinction between discretionary powers of the Governor and binding advice of the Council of Ministers.
pyqAnalysis.difficultyTrend: Moderate to Analytical. SSC CGL has shifted away from purely direct article-matching questions towards multi-statement assertion-reason questions, particularly regarding local body election mechanisms, the specific powers of State Legislative Councils vs Assemblies, and the exact provisions of the 11th and 12th Schedules.
highProbabilityQuestions: Which committee first recommended constitutional recognition for Panchayati Raj institutions?
What is the maximum delay period permitted for a State Legislative Council on an ordinary bill passed by the Assembly?
Under which article is the State Finance Commission constituted, and who appoints its members?
What are the specific operational differences between the pardoning powers of the President under Article 72 and the Governor under Article 161?
Which constitutional amendment act added Part IX-A and the Twelfth Schedule to the Indian Constitution?
